runTitle: Vercel Production QA - Core Route and AI Sidebar Broad Validation

expertAssessments.rationale: Vercel production에서 guest/dashboard/AI sidebar/AI chat core flow 9개가 모두 통과했다.
이번 런은 mobile matrix나 고부하 루프 없이 단일 low-volume Playwright pass로 제한했고, free-tier compatible 운영 원칙을 유지했다.
기존 production Playwright 스펙(guest, dashboard-ai-sidebar, dashboard-ai-chat)을 그대로 재사용해 핵심 경로를 검증했다.

usageChecks.summary: Local CLI usage fetch was unavailable in-session; manual dashboard verification remains required. This run used one low-volume Playwright pass only (guest + dashboard + AI sidebar/chat).
usageChecks.evidence: npm run check:usage:vercel (CLI unavailable in current environment)

notes: Covered packs: landing/login(guest), dashboard, AI sidebar, AI chat streaming path.
Retention manual suite attempted separately but current playwright.manual.config.ts launcher path was excluded from this run.
